'''Yavin 3''' was a [[Stone/Legends|rocky]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] that surrounded the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]] in the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]], a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] apart of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

{{Moon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the comic story ''[[Star Terror!]]'', the third moon of Yavin was depicted as the site of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Great Temple/Legends|headquarters]]<ref name="SWW108">{{StoryCite|story=Star Terror!|book=Star Wars Weekly 108}}</ref>. However, this was corrected to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in a [[The Word for World is Death!|later issue]].<ref name="SWW110">{{StoryCite|story=The Word for World is Death!|book=Star Wars Weekly 110}}</ref>
